title: CheckMate
subtitle: AI-Powered News Analysis Tool. Awarded 1st place in the Cloud Native Experience Award hosted by Dell Technologies.
highlights: Integrated three Hugging Face NLP models via REST APIs through a Python microservices backend with an ingress controller.
Engineered a responsive, user-centric web platform using React, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS.
Designed end-to-end UI/UX in Figma across web app, Chrome extension, and Telegram bot.
Validated usability with 30 participants, reaching 0% drop-off and 80% satisfaction.
Standardized Git and Confluence workflows across a 5-person team.
